primary_blocker: R2R margin only ~800/yr after all costs including management fee
key_intelligence: R2R Manchester. After rent obligation, bills, and Stayful management fee, annual net to Kes was only ~800. Completely unviable. Confirms R2R 100% loss rate. Fast-path-gain profile who ran the numbers honestly and found the margin too thin. Stayful's approach of showing real figures rather than inflated projections is correct but uncovers R2R viability problems.
top_objections: After rent and your fee there's almost nothing left
lost_reason: R2R economics unviable. ~800/yr net margin after all costs.
